title: The Crew Learns the Danger of Faces
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the crew learns the danger of faces, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Learns the Danger of Faces. The crew encounters Baroque Works’ strange forces and the danger of deception grows as Alabasta becomes harder to read. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's impossi- BLE! How could a person fall asleep while talking and eating!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Look! He's gone back to eating again as if nothing happened!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: So what's everyone all gathered here for?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: You running some kinda comedy club here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, but... Well, I'm just relieved that you're alright.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Hmph! All that fuss over nothing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did a guy like this show up in this town?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's this kid wearing a strawhat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You seem to be eating without a care in the world, despite all the attention you're drawing.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: What brings the Whitebeard Pirates' 2nd division commander to this kingdom?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: W-white- beard!? He's one of their crew- member...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ahh! Now that I think about it, I've seen that mark on his back before!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's he doing in a place like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Whitebeard Pirates 2nd Division Commander Portgas D. Ace

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: For my little brother, that is...

summary: This part highlights the crew learns the danger of faces and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
